message:
feat(harness): add RunnerPolicy with timeouts, parallelism, guardrails

Implements beads_rust-enep runner policies for the E2E test harness:

- ParallelismMode enum (Serial/Parallel) for scenario execution control
- ResourceGuardrails struct with limits for stdout/stderr bytes,
  artifact file/dir sizes, retention days, and log lines
- RunnerPolicy struct with command/scenario timeouts, parallelism
  settings, guardrails, fail_fast, retry_count, and skip_slow options
- Policy presets: ci() (strict), local() (lenient), benchmark() (no limits)
- Environment variable configuration for all policy settings
- truncate_output() helper for applying guardrails to command output
- Updated CommandResult with stdout_truncated, stderr_truncated, timed_out
- write_summary_with_policy() for including policy in artifact summaries

All 9 new unit tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
